privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Docker Compose task where an agent implements Sidecar and Ambassador patterns to expose logs and reports from a mock legacy financial settlement system. The legacy application writes audit logs to /var/opt/settlement/audit/transaction.log and generates HTML reports to /var/opt/settlement/reports/. The task requires the agent to modify the docker-compose.yml at /home/ga/projects/settlement-system/ to add a log-sidecar service (alpine) that tails transaction logs to stdout, and a report-sidecar service (nginx:alpine) serving reports on host port 8080. All six metadata values in task.json are verified correct: project directory, log path, report path, port number, admin user 'ga', and pass threshold of 80 points.
